name: appointment_confirmation
body: Hello {{1}}, your appointment at {{2}} is confirmed for {{3}} at {{4}}. Reply 1 to Reschedule.

name: reminder_24h
body: Hi {{1}}, this is a reminder for your appointment tomorrow at {{2}} with {{3}}. To reschedule instantly, click here: {{4}}

name: reminder_2h
body: Hi {{1}}, your appointment is in 2 hours ({{2}}). Please arrive 5 minutes early. See you soon!
